bad.text: The rules can change without telling you.
Your personal data can be sold or shared with brokers.
Your account can be closed at any time, for any reason.
They keep a broad license to content you create.
You are tracked for third-party advertising.

clauses.label: Unilateral Changes
clauses.summary: Flipkart can change its fee policy at any time, introduce new fees, and make those changes effective immediately upon posting, without requiring user consent.
clauses.excerpt: Flipkart may charge a nominal fee for browsing and buying on the Platform. Flipkart reserves the right to change its Fee Policy from time to time. In particular, Flipkart may at its sole discretion introduce new services/fees and modify some or all of the existing services/fees offered on the Platform. In such an event, Flipkart reserves the right to introduce fees for the new services offered or amend/introduce fees for existing/new services, as the case may be. Changes to the Fee Policy shall be posted on the Platform and such changes shall automatically become effective immediately after th

clauses.label: Data Sale
clauses.summary: The clause permits sharing or selling personal information to another business entity in the event of a merger, acquisition, or restructuring, requiring the new entity to follow the privacy policy.
clauses.excerpt: We may disclose personal information if required to do so by law or in the good faith belief that such disclosure is reasonably necessary to respond to subpoenas, court orders, or other legal process. clauses.summary: Flipkart can change the terms at any time without prior notice, and the changes take effect immediately upon posting, so users must keep checking to stay compliant.

clauses.label: Unilateral Changes
clauses.summary: The platform can change service fees at its discretion, including based on location, and outlines refund conditions.
clauses.excerpt:
The Platform reserves the right to adjust service fees at its sole discretion, including variations based on delivery pincodes and other factors.

Refund of Platform Fee

a) If the order is lost or undelivered to the preferred location, the complete order amount will be refunded if paid online, including the platform fee net of discounts/ waivers.

b) Platform charges net of discounts/ waivers will be refunded in case of a full order cancellation by Flipkart/ Seller;

clauses.label: Unilateral Changes
clauses.summary: Flipkart can modify or discontinue the Buyer Protection Program at any time without notice and may suspend or block users for false claims.
clauses.excerpt:
Flipkart reserves its right to initiate civil and/or criminal proceedings against a User who, files an invalid and/or false claims or provides false, incomplete, or misleading information. In addition to the legal proceedings as aforesaid, Flipkart may at its sole discretion suspend, block, restrict, cancel the Display Name \[and its related Display Names\] of such User and/or disqualify that user and any related users from availing protection through this program.

Decisions made by Flipkart under the Buyer Protection Program shall be final and binding on its Users.

clauses.label: Data Sale
clauses.summary: The clause says Flipkart will share your personal data and derived insights with affiliates, business partners and third parties who may use it for their own marketing and commercial purposes.
clauses.excerpt: _We collect and analyse your personal data relating to your buying behavior, browsing patterns, preferences, and other information that you choose to provide while interacting with our Platform. We use this information to do internal research on our users' demographics, interests, usage trends, and behavior to better understand your needs and provide you with an enhanced user experience, protect and serve our users. Additionally, this information may also be compiled and analyzed on an aggregated basis. This information may include the URL that you just came from (whether this URL is on our Pl

clauses.label: Data Sale
clauses.summary: The clause states that in a merger or acquisition the company may share or sell your personal data to the acquiring business, allowing the new entity to use it under its own privacy policy.
clauses.excerpt: _We may disclose personal data if required to do so by law or in the good faith belief that such disclosure is reasonably necessary to respond to subpoenas, court orders, or other legal process. We may disclose personal data to law enforcement agencies, third party rights owners, or others in the good faith belief that such disclosure is reasonably necessary to enforce our Terms of Use or Privacy Policy; respond to claims that an advertisement, posting or other content violates the rights of a third party; or protect the rights, property or personal safety of our users or the general public._

clauses.label: Arbitrary Account Termination
clauses.summary: Flipkart can terminate or refuse access to users who are minors or otherwise ineligible to contract.
clauses.excerpt:
Transaction on the Platform is available only to persons who can form legally binding contracts under Indian Contract Act, 1872. Persons who are "incompetent to contract" within the meaning of the Indian Contract Act, 1872 including un-discharged insolvents etc. are not eligible to use the Platform. If you are a minor i.e. under the age of 18 years, you may use the Platform or access content on the Platform only under the supervision and prior consent/ permission of a parent or legal guardian.

clauses.summary: You must keep your login details private and keep your contact info up‑to‑date; if you give false or outdated information, the platform can suspend or terminate your account indefinitely.
clauses.excerpt: If You use the Platform, You shall be responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your Display Name and Password and You shall be responsible for all activities that occur under your Display Name and Password. You agree that if You provide any information that is untrue, inaccurate, not current or incomplete or We have reasonable grounds to suspect that such information is untrue, inaccurate, not current or incomplete, or not in accordance with the this Terms of Use, We shall have the right to indefinitely suspend or terminate or block access of your membership on the Platform and refus

clauses.label: Arbitrary Account Termination
clauses.summary: You must log out after each session and report unauthorized use; the platform may require a password change or suspend your account at its discretion without liability.
clauses.excerpt:
You agree to: (a) ensure that You successfully log out from Your account at the end of each session; and (b) immediately notify Flipkart of any unauthorized use of Your account. If there is reason to believe that there is likely to be a breach of security or misuse of Your account, We may request You to change the password or we may suspend Your account without any liability to Flipkart, for such period of time as we deem appropriate in the circumstances. We shall not be liable for any loss or damage arising from Your failure to comply with this provision.

clauses.label: Arbitrary Account Termination
clauses.summary: The clause prohibits threats, spam, and misuse, stating that violations can lead to actions such as account termination.
clauses.excerpt:
Threats of Bodily Harm - Flipkart does not permit Users to send explicit threats of bodily harm.

Misuse of Flipkart System - Flipkart allows Users to facilitate transactions through the Flipkart system, but will investigate any misuse of this service.

Spoof (Fake) email - Flipkart will never ask you to provide sensitive information through email. In case you receive any spoof (fake) email, you are requested to report the same to Us through 'Contact Us' tab.

clauses.summary: By using the service you consent to see advertisements and promotional content, which may be targeted and can change without notice, and you agree to receive electronic communications from the platform.

By accessing or using the Platform, You grant express consent for Flipkart to display advertisements, promotions, and sponsored content. These may be placed adjacent to, integrated within, or overlaid upon your content, listings, or user interface, as well as throughout the transaction and payment. Please note that the manner, mode, and extent of such advertising are subject to change without specific notice.

Flipkart’s and/or its affiliates’ use of your voice data will be in accordance with the Flipkart Privacy Policy. clauses.label: Third-Party Tracking
clauses.summary: The clause explains that for Plus member benefits the company will share your name, email, and phone number with partner services to activate accounts and send outreach messages.

_To provide our Plus members with bundled third-party benefits (such as streaming subscriptions, including Netflix), we may share your personal information (including name, email address, and mobile number) with our service partners. This data is shared to (a) facilitate seamless account activation on the partner platform, and (b) enable customer outreach and support via SMS, Email, and WhatsApp to help you activate and manage your benefits_

clauses.summary: You agree that the company and its partners can contact you via SMS, messaging apps, calls, or email for purposes described in the privacy policy, and they will inform you of significant policy changes through notices or email.

history.summary: Flipkart's privacy policy allows sharing of personal data with affiliates, business partners, and third parties for their own marketing and commercial purposes. This means that users' data may be used for targeted advertising and marketing by other companies. Additionally, users' data may be shared or sold in the event of a merger or acquisition, and with partner services to activate accounts and send outreach messages. No protective clauses for users were identified in the flagged sections.

Changes to the terms of service allow Flipkart to terminate or refuse access to users more easily, including those who are minors or provide false information. The company can also change its fee policy immediately and use user-provided information without their control. Additionally, Flipkart can collect and use voice data, share personal information with affiliates, and sell personal information in certain situations. Users have limited control over their content and may face account suspension or termination for various reasons. No user-friendly changes were found.
